commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Israel tried to find righteousness in the type which was the law but did not obtain it. However, those who were sealed were elected and did obtain it on account of their belief, being justified by their faith. The rest were blinded, being hardened and rebellious. .

commentaries.author: Diodorus of Tarsus
commentaries.content: What was Israel seeking? The promise that they would be made sons and heirs of the universe. .
